calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Oct-15-2014 Off Calendar

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Sep-16-2014 Continued To Nov-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Bugato for Petitioner.

The Court noted that this matter has been on calendar 16 times. Mr. Bugato apologized and stated that they are ready. The Court pointed out that they are not ready, went through the list of items raised in the Probate Examiner's notes dated September 12, 2014 and explained the amount of Court resources expended to address this petition time after time. Mr. Bugato assured the Court that he will address the issues. The Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee was continued to November 4, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago. (Not Reported)

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Sep-02-2014 Continued To Sep-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Jul-15-2014 Continued To Sep-02-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Bugatto for petitioner.

Mr. Bugatto requested one final continuance. The court noted that this matter has been continued eleven times, informed counsel that notice still is not right and stated that if he plans to go forward he needs to take the time to correct notice. The petition for appointment of successor trustee was continued to September 2, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Bugatto for Bernard Kealey.

The Court informed Counsel that it does not have the notice of hearing judicial council form or notice of the amendment. The Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee was continued to March 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
